MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-06-2005 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF LISA SWOR-YIM'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/14/05 IS CONTINUED TO 4/25/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE CURRENT MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED. A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. HAKEWILL; REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, (206)
